moments.title: England vs. Panama in World Cup 2026
moments.blurb: England play Panama in their final Group L fixture of the FIFA World Cup 2026 tonight, live from New York/New Jersey Stadium.

angles.name: Match Night Build-Up
angles.copy: It's World Cup action tonight! England face Panama in their final Group L game. Kick-off is 10pm, but the build-up starts earlier on ITV1. Are you ready?

angles.name: Pre-Match Excitement
angles.copy: England vs. Panama tonight! Will the Three Lions finish top of their group? Get your snacks ready, it's a 10pm kick-off!

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, hosted by Maya Jama, continues tonight with its nightly dose of villa drama on ITV2 and ITVX.

angles.name: Tonight's Drama
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island drama! What bombshells are we expecting in the villa tonight? Tune in at 9pm on ITV2!

angles.name: Weekend Catch-Up
angles.copy: Saturday means 'Unseen Bits' on Love Island UK! Catch up on all the hilarious and dramatic moments you might have missed this week.

moments.title: Two Weeks in August Finale
moments.blurb: The 'frantic, funny, holiday-from-hell drama' Two Weeks in August concludes tonight with a double bill finale on BBC One.

angles.name: Drama Finale
angles.copy: It's the dramatic double bill finale of 'Two Weeks in August' tonight on BBC One! Expect twists, turns, and a fiery conclusion at 9pm.

angles.name: What To Watch Tonight
angles.copy: Looking for gripping Saturday night TV? The final two episodes of the hit drama 'Two Weeks in August' are on BBC One from 9pm. Don't miss it!

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Top UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender and Olivia Dean returns to #1 on the Official UK Singles Chart for its 14th nonconsecutive week, as published on Friday.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are back at #1! 'Rein Me In' makes it a phenomenal 14 non-consecutive weeks atop the Official UK Singles Chart. Incredible!

angles.name: Weekend Playlist
angles.copy: This weekend's soundtrack just got sorted! 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender & Olivia Dean is holding strong at UK #1. What are your other top picks from the chart?

moments.title: Wireless Festival Returns Next Month
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival is set to take over London's Finsbury Park from July 10-12, 2026, with Ye (Kanye West) confirmed as the headliner for all three days.

angles.name: Wireless Countdown
angles.copy: London! Wireless Festival is just around the corner, July 10-12 at Finsbury Park. Get ready for a massive weekend of music with Ye headlining!

angles.name: Ye Live in London
angles.copy: Ye is headlining all three days of Wireless Festival this July! Who's excited to see him take the stage in Finsbury Park? #Wireless

moments.title: Glastonbury Takes Fallow Year
moments.blurb: Glastonbury Festival is taking its traditional 'fallow year' in 2026 to allow Worthy Farm to recover, with the next festival confirmed for June 2027.

angles.name: No Glasto This Year
angles.copy: Missing Glastonbury this weekend? It's a fallow year for Worthy Farm, so no festival in 2026. But get ready, it's back in June 2027!

angles.name: Glastonbury Break
angles.copy: It's a quiet one on Worthy Farm as Glastonbury takes its planned break this year. Who's already counting down to 2027?

moments.title: Bruce Johnston's 84th Birthday
moments.blurb: Bruce Johnston, Grammy Award-winning singer-songwriter and long-standing member of The Beach Boys, celebrates his 84th birthday today.

angles.name: Beach Boys Legend
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to the legendary Bruce Johnston of The Beach Boys! What's your favourite Beach Boys track featuring Bruce?

angles.name: Music Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to Bruce Johnston, a true icon of music, celebrating 84 today! From 'California Girls' to 'Kokomo', his influence is undeniable.

moments.title: H.E.R.'s 29th Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy and Oscar-winning R&B singer-songwriter H.E.R. (Gabriella Wilson) turns 29 today.

angles.name: R&B Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 29th Birthday to the incredibly talented H.E.R.! What's your go-to track from this amazing artist?

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger's 48th Birthday
moments.blurb: Nicole Scherzinger, known for her work with The Pussycat Dolls and as a TV personality, celebrates her 48th birthday on June 29.

angles.name: Pop Diva Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a fabulous 48th Birthday to Nicole Scherzinger on Monday! From Pussycat Dolls hits to solo anthems, she's a true star. What's your favourite of hers?

moments.title: Ian Paice's 78th Birthday
moments.blurb: Ian Paice, the iconic drummer and only constant member of Deep Purple, turns 78 on June 29.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to Deep Purple's drumming powerhouse, Ian Paice, this Monday! A true rock legend. What's your favourite Deep Purple track?

moments.title: Debbie Harry's 81st Birthday
moments.blurb: Debbie Harry, the iconic lead singer of Blondie, celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1.

angles.name: Blondie Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the incredible Debbie Harry on Wednesday! A true trailblazer, what's your top Blondie hit?

moments.title: Missy Elliott's 55th Birthday
moments.blurb: Groundbreaking rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott turns 55 on July 1.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Pioneer Birthday
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! Happy 55th Birthday to the legendary Missy Elliott this Wednesday. A true pioneer in music!

moments.title: Burna Boy's 35th Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy Award-winning Nigerian singer Burna Boy, a global ambassador for Afrobeats, celebrates his 35th birthday on July 2.

angles.name: Afrobeats Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 35th Birthday to the incredible Burna Boy this Thursday! What's your favourite track from the 'African Giant'?

moments.title: Vince Clarke's 66th Birthday
moments.blurb: Vince Clarke, the synth-pop innovator behind Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, turns 66 on July 3.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Master Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 66th Birthday to synth-pop maestro Vince Clarke on Friday! From Depeche Mode to Erasure, his influence is huge. #VinceClarke

moments.title: Post Malone's 31st Birthday
moments.blurb: Multi-platinum selling artist Post Malone, known for blending genres like hip-hop, pop, and rock, celebrates his 31st birthday on July 4.

angles.name: Chart-Topper Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday to the one and only Post Malone this Saturday! What's your favourite Posty anthem?
